name: Spark Creations
description:
Spark Creations is the official fashion society of KIET. Our club serves as a dynamic platform for students to explore and express their creativity through fashion, design, and performance. From conceptualizing themes to executing professional ramp walks and creative shoots, Spark Creations integrates artistry, culture, and innovation. The club encourages individuality and teamwork, nurturing the talents of students who aspire to make a mark in fashion, media, and creative industries.

The club operates through multiple domains to ensure excellence in every aspect:

Fashion and Modelling
  Graphics
Photography and Videography
Social Media and Content
Management and PR
Creative Domain
